subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which fort in Rajasthan was built by Raja Rao Jodha?
question_hi: राजा राव जोधा ने बनाया है।
explanation_en: Kumbhalgarh Fort was built by Raja Rao Jodha.
explanation_hi:
कुम्भलगढ़ कंट्रॉल, Raja Rao Jodha ne banaya hai.

इसके लिए सबसे बढ़ाई करने वाला Raja Rao Jodha ने Kumbhalgarh Fort के लिए से लिए।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the author of the book 'Mera Rajasthan', a popular book about Rajasthan?
question_hi: मैं 'मेरा राजस्थान' का लेखना कौन से किया है, इसका एक प्रश्न के लेखना से लिए।
explanation_en: Khena was the author of the book 'Mera Rajasthan'. This book is popular for its vivid description of various aspects of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: केना राजस्थान का 'मेरा राजस्थान' का लेखना से लिएका है, इसका एक विच्छाता कोर्ना

options.option_explain_en: Porusa was the author of another book about Rajasthan.
Khena was the author of a book on Rajasthan.
Porusa authored a book about the history of Rajasthan.
Khena wrote a book focusing on the culture of Rajasthan.
